rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees refer to visible features in valid scopes.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Validate AGREE scalar type names (int, real, bool) and align assumed types with actual expression types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Avoid using opaque Boolean data in numeric range comparisons without explicit scalar representation.
